steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The text before the blank is an independent clause ("A lamp inside the tree-shaped structure"). The blank is followed by another independent clause ("the green glass").

steps.title: Apply the tense agreement rule
steps.content: The passage describes a present-tense process ("bathed in a soft green glow," "source of the glow"). The verb must be in the simple present tense to match, as this is a habitual, factual action. B) "illuminates" uses simple present. The other choices violate this: A uses future progressive, C uses conditional, and D uses past tense. That matches choice B — B is correct.
